data.body: Change 1 MERGED to main (Gerrit 249, both gates green). 444d + 13eb CLOSED with completion-verifier attestations. Change 2 (class B adopt) re-pushed as Gerrit 253 patchset 2 (fixed module-size gate: trimmed apply_inbound.py to 800 LOC). Change 3 (7d23 baseline dual-write shadow + rollback doc) pushed as Gerrit 256, stacked on 253. 5854 + 7d23 await votes; 7d23's live-pass operational ACs (>=10 clean live passes ~3.5h + capped live heal of REB-464/456/465/466/457/530/532) cannot run in an agent session and remain owned by the deployed workflow.
